sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id UInt32, keys Array(Int32), values Array(Float64));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id UInt32, key_val Tuple(Array(Int32), Array(Float64)));
SELECT id, mapSubtract(map(keys, values), map(1, 1)) as res FROM test_table1 WHERE id != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_table2);
SELECT a.id, mapSubtract(tuple(a.keys, a.values), (SELECT tuple([2], [0])) ) as result FROM test_table1 a WHERE NOT a.id = ALL (SELECT b.id FROM test_table2 b HAVING count(b.key_val) > 0);
SELECT k, v FROM (SELECT keys[1] as k, values[1] as v FROM test_table1) WHERE v != ALL (SELECT value FROM (SELECT mapSubtract(tuple([2], [NULL]), tuple([2], [5]))));
